metadata.description: GTM strategy skills for IT agencies — a 13-step cold-audit flow that outputs a full go-to-market strategy and a 30-90-180 action plan to Notion.

plugins.name: gtm-strategy
plugins.description: Cold-audit GTM strategy flow for IT agencies: 13 steps + orchestrator (stage -> ICP/market -> sizing -> competitor/GAP -> positioning -> value prop -> offers -> buyer journey -> materials/channels/docs -> 30-90-180 action plan). Outputs to Notion in Ukrainian.
